techniques.name: Process Injection
techniques.description: Adversaries inject code into processes to evade defenses or elevate privileges.

techniques.name: Ptrace System Call Injection
techniques.description: Adversaries use ptrace(2) to inject code into running processes on Linux.

techniques.name: Process Hollowing
techniques.description: Adversaries inject code into a suspended/hollowed process before execution.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
techniques.description: Adversaries abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands.

techniques.name: PowerShell
techniques.description: Adversaries abuse PowerShell to execute commands and scripts on Windows hosts.

techniques.name: Unix Shell
techniques.description: Adversaries abuse Unix shell commands and scripts to execute payloads.

techniques.name: Application Layer Protocol
techniques.description: Adversaries embed C2 in standard application-layer protocols.

techniques.name: Web Protocols
techniques.description: Adversaries communicate using HTTP/S to blend with normal web traffic.

techniques.name: DNS
techniques.description: Adversaries use DNS protocol for C2 to evade network monitoring.

techniques.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
techniques.description: Adversaries transfer tools or files from an external system into a compromised environment.

techniques.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution
techniques.description: Adversaries configure system settings to execute programs at boot or logon.

techniques.name: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder
techniques.description: Adversaries achieve persistence by adding entries to Windows Run keys or the Startup folder.

techniques.name: Obfuscated Files or Information
techniques.description: Adversaries make payloads difficult to discover or analyze by encrypting, encoding, or otherwise obfuscating their contents.

techniques.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
techniques.description: Adversaries encrypt data on target systems to interrupt availability.

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping
techniques.description: Adversaries attempt to dump credentials to obtain account login material.

techniques.name: File and Directory Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries enumerate files and directories to gather information about a host.
